Work Samples

Projects & Dashboards

Steel Price Comparison Dashboard
Power BI dashboard comparing competitor steel brand net sales prices across regions and months, with historical price trend tracking for strategic pricing decisions.
Power BIDAXSQLExcel
AR Import Data Analysis
Comprehensive Power BI report analyzing import data by product category, currency, fiscal year, and customs office — surfaces top exporters, C&F agents, and quantity by origin.
Power BIDAXSQL
Supplier Assessment Scorecard
Multi-factor supplier scoring model (Volume, Price, Frequency, Diversity, Recency, Country Risk) producing weighted scores and Tier 1+/1/2/3 classifications for sourcing decisions.
Power BIDAXRFMWeighted Scoring
Seasonality Analysis Dashboard
Year-over-year seasonality analysis with monthly import quantity, % share, demand classification (Peak / Stable / Low) and buying-status recommendations (Strong Buy / Hold).
Power BIDAXForecasting
Abnormality Analysis Dashboard
Automated price and quantity abnormality detection comparing importer averages vs market averages with deviation flags (Normal / Abnormal Drop) and importer-wise price trend monitoring.
Power BIDAXStatistics
Import Data Analysis (Last 13 Months)
Monthly importer-level pricing dashboard tracking top 20 importers by volume — supports negotiation, benchmarking, and procurement planning over a rolling 13-month window.
Power BIDAXExcel
⚡
Automated ETL Pipelines — Akij Resource
Python + N8N ETL pipelines pulling from PDFs, spreadsheets, and external sources into centralized databases. Cut manual processing 87.5% and held 99%+ data accuracy via validation and QA.
PythonN8NSQLPostgreSQL

Prostate Cancer Bioinformatics Research
